name: sign-in-slice
title: Sign-In Slice
author: Parable
description: A complete drop-in sign-in card: spring floating-label email input, a continue button that runs an inline progress sheen then morphs into a drawn success check + "Check your inbox" panel, OAuth-style buttons, and mono fine print. Real form/label/aria-live semantics; shake, sheen, and springs drop to instant swaps under reduced-motion.
